task.title: Create a Pattern
task.shortdesc: Create plugin pattern definitions that emit stable evidence for planning.

prereq.p: Create a plugin package with a DitaPlugin subclass and collect representative migration fixtures.
For first-time plugin onboarding, start with one pattern and one fixture package before you add additional rules.

step.cmd: Define a namespaced pattern ID and explicit applies_to value.

info.p: Use a plugin namespace prefix such as com.acme.migration.special_map_by_filename.

step.cmd: Define deterministic signals and explicit asserts role and confidence.

info.codeblock:
from dita_package_processor.discovery.patterns import Pattern
Pattern( id="com.acme.migration.special_map_by_filename", applies_to="map", signals={"filename": {"equals": "SpecialMap.ditamap"}}, asserts={"role": "special_map", "confidence": 1.0}, rationale=["SpecialMap.ditamap is the migration entry map for this corpus."], )

step.cmd: Return pattern objects from patterns() in your plugin class.
Validate plugin structure before running migration jobs.
Run discovery on fixture packages and verify expected evidence appears.

result.p: Discovery emits stable evidence records that planning can consume for deterministic routing.
result.codeblock: plugin validate output includes: Validation passed - 1 entry point(s) OK discovery evidence includes new pattern_id entries
